summary.en: Peer-to-peer accommodation platform founded in 2008 in San Francisco — three roommates rented air mattresses on their living-room floor to rescue rent during a sold-out conference and named the result 'Air Bed & Breakfast'. Mechanically a textbook two-sided platform: hosts list spare rooms, apartments, or whole properties; guests book per night via the platform with reviews + ratings as the trust substitute. Airbnb takes ~3% from hosts + ~14% from guests per booking (combined ~13-15% take rate). Network effects + reviews-as-cumulative-asset compound: more hosts → more inventory → more guest searches → more reviews → higher trust → more hosts. Blitzscaled internationally 2011-2018, IPO 2020 at ~$87B during the COVID-era pivot to long-stays + 'live anywhere'. Sub-brands: Airbnb Plus (verified-quality 2018), Airbnb Luxe (high-end 2019), Airbnb Experiences (host-led tours, scaled 2016+). The case shows the asymmetric BMC pair — guests (demand-side scale) + hosts (supply-side income) — that codifies a peer-to-peer accommodation marketplace where reviews substitute for prior brand trust.
summary.zh: P2P 共享住宿平台,2008 年在旧金山创立 —— 三个室友在客厅地板上摆了几张充气床,用来在爆满的设计师大会期间救房租,起名「Air Bed & Breakfast」。机制上是教科书级的双边平台:房东挂出空房间、整套公寓或整栋房产;客人按晚通过平台预订,评论与评分作为信任替代物。Airbnb 向房东抽 ~3%、向客人收 ~14%(合计抽成约 13-15%)。网络效应 + 评论作为累积资产同时复利:房东越多 → 库存越多 → 客人搜索越多 → 评论越多 → 信任越强 → 房东越多。2011-2018 年全球闪电扩张,2020 年在新冠疫情期间转向长租 + 「Live anywhere」时上市,市值约 870 亿美元。子品牌:Airbnb Plus(2018 质量验证)、Airbnb Luxe(2019 高端)、Airbnb Experiences(房东带的小团游,2016 后规模化)。本案例呈现了那对不对称 BMC —— 客人侧(需求侧规模)+ 房东侧(供给侧收入) —— 把那种「评论替代品牌信任」的 P2P 住宿市场讲清楚。

sources.label: Brad Stone · The Upstarts: How Uber, Airbnb, and the Killer Companies of the New Silicon Valley Are Changing the World · Little, Brown · 2017
Leigh Gallagher · The Airbnb Story · Houghton Mifflin Harcourt · 2017
businessmodelhacking.com · Airbnb Business Model Canvas Example
Osterwalder & Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley · 2010 (Pattern No. 3, multi-sided-platforms pp. 76-81)
Osterwalder, Pigneur, Bernarda & Smith · Value Proposition Design · Wiley · 2014 (Design constraints: platform value propositions, p. 91)

headline.en: A trust-building marketplace, not just spare-room supply
headline.zh: 一个信任构建型市场平台，而不只是闲置房源供给

whyOpen.en: Airbnb shows how a platform turns idle supply into bookable inventory by designing trust, reviews, payments, and host incentives.
whyOpen.zh: Airbnb 展示了平台如何通过信任、评论、支付和房东激励，把闲置供给变成可预订库存。

audience.en: Readers studying peer-to-peer marketplaces, trust substitutes, and cold-start supply creation.
audience.zh: 适合研究 P2P 市场平台、信任替代物和冷启动供给创造的读者。

commonMisreads.en: The story is not just asset-light growth; without governance and trust, asset-light supply can become low-quality noise.
commonMisreads.zh: 这个故事不只是轻资产增长；没有治理和信任，轻资产供给会变成低质量噪音。

practicePrompts.en: What would make your supply side feel safe before demand is proven?
practicePrompts.zh: 在需求尚未被证明前，什么会让你的供给侧觉得安全？

practicePrompts.en: Which trust signal compounds over time instead of being recreated for every transaction?
practicePrompts.zh: 哪一种信任信号会随时间复利，而不是每笔交易重新建立？
